scripts.bench:transaction: pnpm --filter @tarstate/core build && pnpm --filter @tarstate/automerge build && node --expose-gc --disable-warning=TimeoutNegativeWarning scripts/transaction-performance.mjs
scripts.bench:automerge: pnpm --filter @tarstate/core build && pnpm --filter @tarstate/automerge build && node scripts/automerge-performance.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm check:boundaries && pnpm typecheck && pnpm typecheck:budget && pnpm build && pnpm check:built-boundaries && pnpm check:tree-shaking && pnpm check:examples && pnpm test
scripts.check:perf: pnpm bench && pnpm bench:query && pnpm bench:observer && pnpm bench:transaction && pnpm bench:automerge
scripts.check:release: pnpm check && pnpm test:fuzz && pnpm check:perf && tsc -p tsconfig.release.json && node scripts/verify-release.mjs
